dashboard.label: PhishNet AI — Blast Radius
dashboard.description: Security + observability fusion: did the phishing payload actually execute? The attack chain in one timeline.

search.query: | inputlookup phishnet_decisions where recommended_action!="close" | dedup alert_id | sort alert_id | table alert_id

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions where alert_id="$alert_tok$" | eval v=case(payload_executed="true" OR payload_executed="True" OR payload_executed=1, "PAYLOAD EXECUTED", true(), "no execution detected") | table v
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions where alert_id="$alert_tok$" | eval host=if(isnull(affected_host) OR affected_host="", "n/a", affected_host) | table host
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions where alert_id="$alert_tok$" | eval n=coalesce(recipient_count, 0) | table n

| inputlookup phishnet_decisions | search alert_id="$alert_tok$" | eval _raw=if(isnull(blast_timeline_json) OR blast_timeline_json="", "[]", blast_timeline_json) | spath input=_raw path={} output=ev | mvexpand ev | spath input=ev path=time output=time | spath input=ev path=event output=event | table time, event | sort time
| inputlookup phishnet_decisions where alert_id="$alert_tok$" | table verdict, confidence, reasoning, recommended_action
